channel.title: Noticias Forex — Global Investing
channel.description: Noticias forex de alto impacto en tiempo real con análisis fundamental para las 8 divisas G8.

item.title: BoE unanimous rate hold surprises as doves abandon cut calls amid energy shock
item.description: Bank of England left Bank Rate unchanged at 3.75%, but the unanimous vote came as a clear surprise. Markets had expected a 6–3 or 7–2 split, with several known doves continuing to push for rate cuts. Instead, even the most dovish members backed a hold, signaling a sharp shift in near-term policy thinking as the […] The post BoE unanimous rate... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Breaking: BoE maintains bank rate at 3.75% as anticipated
item.description: The Bank of England (BoE) announced on Thursday that it maintained the bank rate at 3.75% following the March policy meeting, as widely expected. All nine members of the Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) voted in favor of the decision. Markets were expecting two policymakers to vote for a rate cut. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BOE leaves bank rate unchanged at 3.75% in March meeting decision
item.description: Prior 3.75% Bank rate vote 9-0 vs 7-2 expected Conflict in the Middle East has caused a significant increase in global energy and other commodity prices, which will affect households’ fuel and utility prices and have indirect effects via businesses’ costs CPI inflation will be higher in the near term as a result of the new shock to the economy The ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: Bank Rate maintained at 3.75% - March 2026 Monetary Policy Summary and Minutes
item.description: The Bank of England’s Monetary Policy Committee is responsible for making decisions about Bank Rate. Fuente: Bank of England

item.title: The USD is lower vs the EUR, JPY and GBP despite yields moving higher. EURCHF rebounds
item.description: The USD is mixed but modestly lower against the major pairs, with gains in EURUSD, USDJPY, and GBPUSD, while the greenback is firmer vs CHF and flat vs CAD. It is also softer against AUD and NZD, even as US equity futures point lower. US yields are pushing higher, with the 10-year at 4.29% (near 4.30%) and the 2-year up 7.7 bps to 3.82%, reflecting... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: investingLive European markets wrap: Brent crude, European gas prices surge; SNB holds
item.description: Headlines: The hawkish repricing in interest rates expectations continues as US-Iran war escalates Gold plunges to new lows as US-Iran war escalates and the Fed considers a rate hike Silver drops by over 5% and the chart shows that there might be more trouble up ahead A quick rundown of how Iran has hit back after South Pars gas field was attacked ... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: JPY: BoJ holds but flags further hikes – BNY
item.description: BNY’s Head of Markets Macro Strategy Bob Savage notes that the Bank of Japan (BoJ) kept its policy rate around 0.75% with an 8–1 vote, noting moderate economic recovery and inflation near 2%. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Markets Today: European Gas futures soar 25%, Brent hits $119/barrel. Central bank pressure heats up as ECB meeting looms
item.description: Middle East tensions cause European markets to slide as gas and oil prices soar. Central banks like the ECB and BoE are now expected to implement rate hikes to combat energy-driven inflation, abandoning prior rate cut forecasts. The report also details FX market reactions and provides technical analysis on the FTSE 100. Fuente: MarketPulse

item.title: CHF: Dovish SNB stance with benign inflation – ING
item.description: ING’s Senior Economist Charlotte de Montpellier notes that the Swiss National Bank kept its policy rate at 0% as low inflation and a strong Swiss Franc cushion higher energy prices. The SNB’s new projections show very weak inflation through 2027, reinforcing expectations of unchanged rates. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: European Central Bank set to hold interest rate amid Iran war-driven inflation fears
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) will announce its monetary policy decision on Thursday, following a two-day meeting. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: A quick rundown of how Iran has hit back after South Pars gas field was attacked
item.description: Well, US president Trump continued to say that the war is very much following a timely schedule. And that this will all be over in a matter of "weeks". Yet, the escalation in the conflict this week suggests that we're still not really seeing things wind down. That especially as Iran continues to have the capacity to inflict damage across the region... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: Japanese Yen outperforms as BoJ’s Ueda keeps door open for interest rate hikes
item.description: The Japanese Yen (JPY) outperforms its major currency pairs during the European trading session on Thursday. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: The hawkish repricing in interest rates expectations continues as US-Iran war escalates
item.description: Rate cuts by year-end Fed: 11 bps (94% probability of no change at the next meeting) Rate hikes by year-end RBNZ: 58 bps (96% probability of no change at the next meeting) ECB: 56 bps (92% probability of no change at today's decision) RBA: 55 bps (55% probability of rate hike at the next meeting) BoJ: 45 bps (53% probability of rate hike at the nex... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CAD: BoC opens door to hike on energy – BBH
item.description: Brown Brothers Harriman’s Elias Haddad reports USD/CAD is trading near 1.3735, with resistance at the 200-day moving average. The Bank of Canada (BoC) held its overnight rate at 2.25% but dropped guidance that policy is appropriate, signalling a live hiking bias if energy prices stay high. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: BoE set to hold interest rate steady, in quick turnaround after Oil-driven inflation shock
item.description: The Bank of England (BoE) is on track to leave the benchmark Bank Rate unchanged at 3.75% for the second meeting in a row on Thursday, as the macro context has completely shifted in the past three weeks. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Gold plunges to new lows as US-Iran war escalates and the Fed considers a rate hike
item.description: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW Gold plunged yesterday after breaking out of its recent consolidation range. The move gained momentum following news of an Israeli strike on Iran’s South Pars gas field. In the days leading up to this, Iran had warned it would respond if its energy infrastructure were targeted. The attack marked a clear escalation for markets a... Fuente: InvestingLive

item.title: EUR/JPY declines as BoJ hints at future hikes, ECB decision looms
item.description: EUR/JPY trades around 182.70 on Thursday at the time of writing, down 0.23% on the day, as markets digest comments from the Bank of Japan (BoJ) governor and await the European Central Bank (ECB) decision. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Fed: Summer deadline for patience and delayed cuts – TD Securities
item.description: TD Securities economists say the FOMC kept policy unchanged and Powell downplayed the SEP, but they see the Fed’s patience on inflation normalization expiring by late summer as an Oil shock lifts headline inflation. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Oro (XAU/USD) Hoy: Señales Técnicas y Fundamentales Indican que la Corrección Podría Continuar - 19 marzo 2026
item.description: El XAU/USD muestra corrección tras semanas de subidas previas. El fortalecimiento del dólar y la postura hawkish de la Fed generan presión vendedora. Movimientos macroeconómicos hoy podrían intensificar la volatilidad. Fuente: DailyForex ES

item.title: GBP: Sterling pressured as BoE seen on hold – Societe Generale
item.description: Societe Generale’s Kenneth Broux expects the Bank of England to keep rates unchanged while warning on upside inflation risks, with markets now pricing the next move as a hike. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: SNB’s Schlegel: Our willingness to intervene has increased
item.description: Swiss National Bank (SNB) Chairman Martin Schlegel stressed the central bank’s willingness to intervene against excessive appreciation of the Swiss Franc (CHF) in his press conference post the monetary policy announcement, in which the central bank left interest rates unchanged at 0%, as expected. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: JPY: Yen holds better as BoJ keeps April hike option open – MUFG
item.description: MUFG’s Senior Currency Analyst Lee Hardman reports the Japanese Yen is holding up better against the Dollar as the BoJ leaves the door open to an April rate hike and officials step up FX warnings. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: ECB preview: interest rates to remain unchanged with more emphasis on inflation risk
item.description: The European Central Bank is expected to leave interest rates unchanged at 2.00% and retire the "good place" language amid the US-Iran war and the energy price shock. The central bank is expected to use a more hawkish tone to keep inflation expectations in check. The "meeting-by-meeting" and "data-dependent" approach will likely be maintained but t... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: SNB chairman Schlegel: Swiss franc rise poses risk to price stability
item.description: As such, our willingness to intervene has increased The upward pressure on the franc has increased once again The franc is sought after as a safe haven in times of uncertainty It is 2.5% stronger on a trade-weighted basis since the middle of December We are ready to counter a rapid and excessive rise of the franc currency Appreciation of franc in r... Fuente: ForexLive

item.title: USD/CHF steadies near 0.7900 as SNB keeps interest rate flat at 0%
item.description: USD/CHF depreciated after registering over 1% gains in the previous session, trading around 0.7920 during the Asian hours on Thursday. The pair moved little after the Swiss National Bank (SNB) decided to keep its interest rate flat at 0% in the first quarter of 2026, as widely expected. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: EUR/USD Forecast: Euro sellers step away as focus shifts to ECB
item.description: After posting moderate gains on Monday and Tuesday, EUR/USD reversed its direction and declined sharply on Wednesday. The pair stays in a consolidation phase near 1.1450 in the European morning on Thursday as investors gear up for the European Central Bank's (ECB) policy decisions. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: Fed: Hawkish hold provided momentary anchor for USD – DBS
item.description: DBS Group Research economist Philip Wee notes that the Federal Reserve (Fed) kept the Fed Funds Rate at 3.50-3.75%, delivering what he characterizes as a hawkish hold. He highlights that this stance has given the Dollar only a temporary anchor, as markets remain volatile. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: SNB holds rates, signals stronger FX intervention to cap Franc strength
item.description: SNB holds rates but strengthens intervention stance, aiming to cap CHF gains as energy-driven inflation rises only temporarily. The central bank kept its policy rate unchanged at 0.00%, as widely expected, but sharpened its language on foreign exchange intervention amid heightened global uncertainty. The key shift lies in the SNB’s explicit acknowl... Fuente: ActionForex

item.title: Swiss National Bank leaves interest rates unchanged at 0%, as expected
item.description: The Swiss National Bank (SNB) holds interest rates steady at 0%, as expected. Now investors await Chairman Martin Schlegel's upcoming press conference at 09:00 GMT, where they will be looking for fresh cues on the monetary policy outlook. Fuente: FXStreet

item.title: SNB leaves key policy rate unchanged at 0% in March meeting, as widely expected
item.description: Prior 0.00% Our willingness to intervene in the FX market has increased due to the Middle East crisis SNB to counter rapid and excessive appreciation of the Swiss franc, which could jeopardise price stability Economic outlook for Switzerland for the coming months is uncertain Main risk to the Swiss economy is the development of the global economy I... Fuente: ForexLive
